title: design-system scheme
description: A filled palette for the base24 design-system standard. See spec/*.md.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in a scheme picker.

system.description: Which slot set this scheme fills. base16 = base00..base0F; base24 = base00..base17. See spec/base16-policy.md.

slots.description: Slot -> CSS color string (hex, rgb(), oklch(), ...). Required keys depend on 'system'.

overrides.description: Exact values for specific semantic variables that win over the role->slot mapping (alpha colors, monochrome charts, etc.). Per-tool vocabulary.

pureBase16.description: Opt into duplication (alias missing slots) instead of derivation when system=base16. Escape hatch; see spec/base16-policy.md tier 3.
